pins.name: RST
pins.function:
Device Reset. Open-drain output of internal POR or V monitor. An
DD
external source can initiate a system reset by driving this pin low for
at least 15µs.

pins.name: REGIN
pins.function:
5V Regulator Input. This pin is the input to the on-chip voltage regu-
lator.

pins.name: VBUS
pins.function:
VBUS Sense Input. This pin should be connected to the VBUS signal
of a USB network. A 5V signal on this pin indicates a USB network
connection.

pins.name: CTS
pins.function: Clear To Send control input (active low)

pins.name: RTS
pins.function: Ready to Send control output (active low)

pins.name: DSR
pins.function: Data Set Ready control input (active low)

pins.name: DTR
pins.function: Data Terminal Ready control output (active low)

pins.name: DCD
pins.function: Data Carrier Detect control input (active low)

pins.name: SUSPEND
pins.function:
This pin is driven high when the CP2102/9 enters the USB suspend
state.

pins.name: SUSPEND
pins.function:
This pin is driven low when the CP2102/9 enters the USB suspend
state.
